creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
Gerald Pfeifer wrote:

> + lib/wine/libwinmm.so.1.0
> + lib/wine/libwinsock.so
> + lib/wine/libwinspool.drv.so
> + lib/wine/libwinspool.drv.so.1.0
> + lib/wine/libwnaspi32.so
> + lib/wine/libwnaspi32.so.1.0
> + lib/wine/libwsock32.so

Please get rid of those old aout-style 1.0 versions, before we could committ this stuff. It could be easily accomplished by replacing SOVERSION=1.0
with SOVERSION=1 in dll's Makefile's - "find ${WRKSRC} -name Makefile.in | xargs perl -pi -e '....'" is your friend.

-Maxim
